data.title: IDT Corporation Q1 FY 2026 results show income from NRS, Fintech, and net2phone segments increasing by 35%, 97%, and 94%. Record levels of consolidated gross profit and Adjusted EBITDA.
data.description: Revenue generated from NRS, Fintech, and net2phone segments saw a significant surge of 35%, 97%, and 94%, respectively. The company achieved all-time high levels of consolidated gross profit and recorded a notable increase in Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EBITDA margin.

data.title: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (NYSE: RHP) declares $1.20/share Q4 dividend, to be paid on Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee, Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (NYSE: RHP) disclosed the approval of a fourth quarter cash dividend of $1.20 per common stock share. The dividend is set to be distributed on January 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of December 31, 2025. Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. focuses on high-end convention center resorts and entertainment ventures and functions as a prominent real estate investment trust in the lodging and hospitality sector.

COINBASE: SOME USERS MAY EXPERIENCE DELAYED SENDS & RECEIVES ON COSMOS NETWORK; BUYS, SELLS, AND FIAT WITHDRAWALS/DEPOSITS UNAFFECTED

APPLE ANNOUNCED A LEADERSHIP SHAKE-UP, WITH META’S FORMER CHIEF LEGAL OFFICER JENNIFER NEWSTEAD SET TO BECOME GENERAL COUNSEL IN MARCH 2026 AS LONGTIME EXECUTIVES KATE ADAMS AND LISA JACKSON PREPARE TO RETIRE.

data.title: Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT) announces $0.71 per share cash dividend for Q3 FY 2026. Board approval on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: In Galway, Ireland, on December 4, 2025, the board of directors of Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT) announced a cash dividend for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 at $0.71 per ordinary share. This decision aligns with the company's ongoing dividend strategy, providing value to shareholders.

data.title: Apple announces executive transitions with Jennifer Newstead becoming general counsel on March 1, 2026, succeeding Kate Adams since 2017. VP Lisa Jackson to retire in late January 2026.
data.description: In Cupertino, California, it was revealed that Jennifer Newstead will take on the role of Apple's general counsel starting on March 1, 2026, succeeding Kate Adams, who has held the position since 2017. Newstead will first join Apple as senior vice president in January and will report to CEO Tim Cook while being a part of the executive team. Concurrently, Lisa Jackson, who serves as vice president for Environment, Policy, and Social Initiatives, is set to retire in late January 2026.

data.title: HPE stock drops as Fiscal Q4 revenue misses expectations, guided lower due to delayed server deals.
data.description: The stock of HPE experienced a drop due to lower-than-expected quarterly sales guidance for the closing month of January. The fiscal Q4 revenue was below expectations, reflecting a decrease in performance. This was mainly attributed to delayed server deals, leading to a weakened outlook.

data.title: CRM stock is strong, emphasizes buyback plan, despite not leading in AI. Potential seen by trader.
data.description: Shares of CRM are demonstrating financial stability and unveiling a robust stock repurchase initiative. A trader is optimistic about the company's prospects, despite it not being recognized as a top AI innovator. The stock symbol CRM could see further growth, as suggested by an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: New Fortress Energy gets 7-year Gas Supply Agreement with Puerto Rico, delivering approx. 75 TBtu of natural gas for energy transformation.
data.description: A company known as New Fortress Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NFE) has recently been granted a 7-year Gas Supply Agreement from the Financial Oversight and Management Board for Puerto Rico. This approval allows the company to provide around 75 TBtu of natural gas to aid in the energy transformation efforts on the island. The agreement requires New Fortress Energy Inc. to deliver more environmentally friendly natural gas, aiming to improve grid stability and promote cleaner power generation in the region.

data.title: Kalshi partners with CNBC to offer live prediction data on TV, digital, and subscription platforms from 2026 onward.
data.description: Beginning in 2026, Kalshi has entered into a multi-year partnership to offer real-time prediction data on CNBC’s TV, digital, and subscription platforms. This collaboration will provide viewers with up-to-date insights and forecasts.

data.title: Coinbase and Chainlink link Solana and Ethereum networks through a new bridge, enhancing interoperability.
data.description: A new bridge has been established between Solana and Base through Chainlink's interoperability protocol, facilitated by crypto exchange Coinbase. This development allows seamless connectivity between the two platforms, resulting in enhanced accessibility and usability for users. The bridge is designed to ensure secure and efficient transfers of assets between Solana and Base. This integration has garnered significant attention from the crypto community, with a substantial increase in users leveraging the connection between Solana and Base. The collaboration between Chainlink, Coinbase, Solana, and Base showcases the growing trend towards interoperability within the crypto space, with the bridge expected to handle a high volume of transactions and further enhance the efficiency of digital asset transfers.

data.title: FHLB Dallas and Hancock Whitney Bank donate over $500K to aid Gulf Coast homeowners in disaster recovery, benefiting 40 families.
data.description: In New Orleans, around 40 Gulf Coast homeowners are set to benefit from assistance in rebuilding their homes, thanks to a disbursement exceeding $500,000 from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) in partnership with Hancock Whitney Bank. This investment in community resilience was commemorated at a check presentation ceremony with a homeowner from the area and Rebuilding Together New Orleans, a local nonprofit that aided in securing grants for 12 residents in New Orleans, Louisiana. These grants were funded through the collaboration between FHLB Dallas and Hancock Whitney Bank.

data.title: American Tower Corp declares $1.70 per share quarterly distribution on common stock, payable on Feb 2, 2026.
data.description: In Boston, American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT) reported a quarterly cash distribution of $1.70 per share on its common stock. The distribution will be paid on February 2, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 29, 2025. American Tower, a major global REIT, specializes in owning, operating, and developing multitenant communications real estate.

data.title: EPR Properties buys 5 golf courses and Ocean Breeze Water Park for $113 million, extra $285 million planned.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, EPR Properties (NYSE:EPR) revealed the purchase and leaseback agreement for a collection of five championship golf courses and Ocean Breeze Water Park in Virginia Beach, VA. The total investment for these acquisitions amounts to $113 million, with a combined blended cap rate of 8.6%. With these new additions, the Company foresees investment spending reaching around $285 million.

data.title: Trisura Group Ltd. renews its Normal Course Issuer Bid on TSX. Dec 04, 2025 announcement for share buyback.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Trisura Group Ltd. ('Trisura' or 'Trisura Group') shared that the Toronto Stock Exchange ('TSX') has approved their notice of intent to renew their Normal Course Issuer Bid ('NCIB'). The bid, set to take place through TSX and/or other trading systems, will allow Trisura Group to repurchase a specific number of its common shares. Trisura Group Ltd., a prominent specialty insurance provider, trades on the TSX under the symbol TSU. This strategic move indicates the company's confidence in its financial position and long-term growth prospects.

data.title: SoFi announces public offering of $1.5B common stock, could grant 15% additional shares, for intended use of funds.
data.description: In San Francisco, SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) revealed a public offering of $1.5 billion in common stock shares. The company plans to grant the underwriter a 30-day option for an additional 15% of the offered shares. SoFi will be selling all the common stock shares in the offering and intends to utilize the net proceeds for undisclosed purposes.

data.title: Lucky Strike Entertainment opens new Aliso Viejo location, expanding in Southern California.
data.description: Luck Strike Entertainment (NYSE: LUCK) has revealed the launch of its latest venue in Aliso Viejo, California, highlighting the company's ongoing growth in Southern California. This new opening comes after the successful unveiling of Lucky Strike Beverly Hills and Lucky Strike Ladera Ranch in December 2024. The company continues its strategic expansion with Lucky Strike Aliso Viejo, solidifying its position as a premier owner/operator of location-based entertainment venues.

data.title: Seabourn's "Explore More Event" offers up to 15% savings and $1,000 shipboard credit on luxury voyages from 2026-2028.
data.description: Luxury cruise and expedition travel leader Seabourn recently announced their annual "Explore More Event," which will showcase remarkable discounts and deals on the majority of their worldwide ocean voyages and expeditions planned for 2026 through 2028. This exclusive event will cover trips to various destinations such as Alaska, Antarctica, Japan, and more. Don't miss out on the chance to save big on these incredible travel experiences.

data.title: CooperCompanies appoints Colleen Jay as new Chair of the Board effective January 2, 2026. Strategic review launched for shareholder value.
data.description: In San Ramon, California, on December 4, 2025, CooperCompanies, a prominent medical device company listed on Nasdaq under COO, revealed that Colleen Jay will take over as Chair following the retirement of Robert Weiss on January 2, 2026. Weiss will continue on the Board and seek reelection one last time. Additionally, the company disclosed a strategic review to pinpoint ways to boost long-term shareholder value.
